misc.title: #ONEPIECE1175 So seems like Gunko/Imu finally saw Luffy,Loki and Ragnir, oh boy shit is about to happen soon since the MMA seems be also gone now... And Imu seems be really pissed... 👀

misc.title: #ONEPIECE1175 Back to the present, Loki is focussed now in the MMA monsters. In the ABSOLUTELY EPIC final double page of the chapter, Loki shoots a MASSIVE lightning attack from his mouth called “Thor
misc.text: #ONEPIECE1175 Back to the present, Loki is focussed now in the MMA monsters. In the ABSOLUTELY EPIC final double page of the chapter, Loki shoots a MASSIVE lightning attack from his mouth called “Thor Heim”. The attack creates a HUGE explosion with normal and black lightnings, and destroys most of the MMA monsters. 🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥

misc.title: #ONEPIECE1175 "Luffy's giant punch hits Sommers' body and electrocutes him at the same time. The attack is so powerful that Sommers' body breaks into pieces (we see how Sommers loses his teeth as his
misc.text: #ONEPIECE1175 "Luffy's giant punch hits Sommers' body and electrocutes him at the same time. The attack is so powerful that Sommers' body breaks into pieces (we see how Sommers loses his teeth as his face splits into several parts)." YOOOOOO🔥🔥
